title: masdevallia aurea
intro: Masdevallia aurea, also known as the Golden Masdevallia, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Masdevallia aurea include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Masdevallia aurea is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be made by steeping the dried roots and leaves in hot water.
